title: alangium nobile
intro: Alangium nobile is a species of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Alangium nobile is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects, and its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
